reviewer_sources.query: Go to https://www.sleepfoundation.org/best-mattress/best-mattress-in-canada and extract every mattress they recommend for Canada. For each product get: full product name, their award or category (Best Overall, Best Value, etc.), price for Queen in CAD, firmness level, mattress type, pros with specific details, cons.

Go to https://www.mattressreviews.ca/best/best-mattress-canada/ and extract every mattress they rank. For each product get: full product name, ranking or category, price for Queen in CAD, firmness, type, pros with specific test details, cons.

Go to https://www.ctvnews.ca/shopping/home/best-mattresses-canada.html and extract every mattress they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price in CAD, key features, pros with specific details, cons.

Go to https://www.sleepopolis.com/guides/how-to-choose-a-mattress/ which is their best mattresses of 2026 page. Extract every mattress they rank. For each product get: full product name, ranking or category, price for Queen, firmness, type, pros with test details, cons.

Go to https://financialpost.com/home-living/sleep/best-mattresses-canada and extract every mattress they recommend. For each product get: full product name, ranking or category, price in CAD, key features, pros with specific details, cons or caveats.
